title: diphelypaea
intro: Diphelypaea is a type of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the "prickly poppy." The medicinal properties of the diphelypaea plant include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antispasmodic. The health benefits of the plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, menstrual cramps, and other digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the diphelypaea plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the plant's flowers and leaves in hot water or using a solvent like ethanol to extract its medicinal properties.
